title: Gaia Named Skill
description: Schema for a named skill implementation contributed by a specific user. Named skills live in graph/named/{contributor}/{skill-name}.md as YAML frontmatter.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the named skill.

origin.description: True if this contributor is the original creator of this skill bucket.

genericSkillRef.description: The abstract Gaia taxonomy ID this named skill implements. Secondary identifier used for graph traversal and prerequisite resolution. Not the primary display identity.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Contributors must always submit with 'awakened'. Only reviewers may promote to 'named' by adding title or catalogRef in a separate classification PR.

title.description: Reviewer-assigned RPG epithet displayed prominently alongside the skill name (e.g. 'The Scholar's Compass'). Must not be set by contributors. Requires status: named.

catalogRef.description: Reviewer-assigned back-link to the realSkillCatalog item id that this named skill was promoted from (e.g. 'karpathy-autoresearch'). Must not be set by contributors. Requires status: named.

level.description: Minimum level (Named and above only; 1★ is generic-only).

description.description: Description of what this specific named implementation does.

tags.description: Lowercase tags for categorization and search.

suiteRef.description: Named skill ID of the suite capstone this skill belongs to (e.g. ruvnet/ruflo). Optional. Set by suite manifest, not required in the .md file itself.

suiteComponents.description: Explicit list of named skill IDs (contributor/skill-name) bundled by this suite. Supersedes generic prerequisite inference during installation.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date when the named skill was first contributed.

evidence.description: Array of evidence entries supporting the skill's level claim.

timeline.description: Chronological history of meta-changes for this named skill implementation.

class.description: Evidence class: A (peer-reviewed), B (reproducible demo), C (credible demo).

evaluator.description: GitHub username of the person who evaluated the evidence.

verified.description: True if the evidence has been verified by a Verifier (4★+ contributor).

disputed.description: True if the evidence is currently under dispute.

verificationSource.description: URL to the verification discussion or PR.

contributor.description: The GitHub username responsible for the change.
